rationale_top3: Strong nature and coastal location appeal with proximity to Warrnambool attractions and the Great Ocean Road Solid entertainment and facility offerings for families with decent amenities Generally clean and well-maintained park environment

kids_play: Entertainment options and play facilities provided for children
pet_detail: Pet policies and facilities not clearly evident from reviews
